# /estimation

## Purpose
Record an approved estimate and select the implementation mode.

## When To Use
Planning phase after the issue scope and worktree are fixed.

## Required Contracts
- `estimate-approval` - Estimate approval artifact exists and is valid
- `mode-selection-recorded` - Implementation mode selection (impl/tdd/custom) and reason are recorded

## Next Commands
- `/impl`
- `/tdd`

## Source Of Truth
- `framework/scripts/manifest.yaml`
- `framework/docs/contract/workflow-map.md`
